scripts.dev: pnpm exec kill-port 5173 || true; pnpm exec vite --host
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck
scripts.clean:all: pnpm exec rimraf dist release node_modules
scripts.electron:dev: pnpm exec concurrently -k "pnpm exec vite" "pnpm exec wait-on http://localhost:5173 && pnpm exec electron ."
scripts.electron:build: pnpm exec vite build && pnpm exec electron-builder
scripts.electron:build:win: pnpm exec vite build && pnpm exec electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build:linux: pnpm exec vite build && pnpm exec electron-builder --linux
scripts.electron:build:mac: pnpm exec vite build && pnpm exec electron-builder --mac
scripts.cap:sync: pnpm exec vite build && pnpm exec cap sync
scripts.meta:build: pnpm exec vite build && pnpm exec zip -r mini-sudoku-web.zip dist/
